title: CatBoost correction weight 0.125
summary: Set the CatBoost correction weight to 0.125 against the RealMLP core.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Change only the fixed CatBoost blend weight to 0.125: final = 0.875 * realmlp_core + 0.125 * catboost_pred. Do not add other models.
expected_effect: Check whether CatBoost can carry a larger share without hurting public ranking.
risk: A larger CatBoost share may overfit or reduce the stronger RealMLP ranking.
